description: Hydropathy profile comparison of IL23R vs PRLR
code:
import requests
import numpy as np

# Fetch sequences
def get_seq(accession):
    url = f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{accession}.fasta"
    resp = requests.get(url)
    lines = resp.text.strip().split('\n')
    return ''.join(lines[1:])

il23r_seq = get_seq("Q5VWK5")
prlr_seq = get_seq("P16471")

# Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy scale
kd = {'A': 1.8, 'R': -4.5, 'N': -3.5, 'D': -3.5, 'C': 2.5,
      'Q': -3.5, 'E': -3.5, 'G': -0.4, 'H': -3.2, 'I': 4.5,
      'L': 3.8, 'K': -3.9, 'M': 1.9, 'F': 2.8, 'P': -1.6,
      'S': -0.8, 'T': -0.7, 'W': -0.9, 'Y': -1.3, 'V': 4.2}

def hydropathy_profile(seq, window=19):
    values = [kd.get(aa, 0) for aa in seq]
    profile = []
    half = window // 2
    for i in range(len(seq)):
        start = max(0, i - half)
        end = min(len(seq), i + half + 1)
        profile.append(np.mean(values[start:end]))
    return np.array(profile)

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 6), sharex=False)

# IL23R hydropathy
hp_il23r = hydropathy_profile(il23r_seq)
axes[0].fill_between(range(len(hp_il23r)), hp_il23r, 0, 
                      where=hp_il23r > 0, color='red', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophobic')
axes[0].fill_between(range(len(hp_il23r)), hp_il23r, 0, 
                      where=hp_il23r <= 0, color='blue', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophilic')
axes[0].plot(range(len(hp_il23r)), hp_il23r, 'k-', linewidth=0.5)
axes[0].axhline(y=1.6, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='TM threshold')
axes[0].axhline(y=0, color='gray', linestyle='-', alpha=0.3)
axes[0].set_title('IL23R (Q5VWK5) — Kyte-Doolittle Hydropathy (window=19)', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].set_ylabel('Hydropathy')
axes[0].legend(fontsize=8)

# Mark TM region
axes[0].axvspan(356, 376, color='red', alpha=0.2)
axes[0].annotate('TM\n356-376', xy=(366, 2), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red')

# Mark domains
for name, start, end in [('Ig', 24, 126), ('FN3-1', 127, 217), ('FN3-2', 219, 318)]:
    axes[0].annotate(name, xy=((start+end)/2, -3.5), fontsize=7, ha='center', 
                    color='green', fontweight='bold')
    axes[0].axvspan(start, end, color='green', alpha=0.05)

# PRLR hydropathy
hp_prlr = hydropathy_profile(prlr_seq)
axes[1].fill_between(range(len(hp_prlr)), hp_prlr, 0, 
                      where=hp_prlr > 0, color='red', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophobic')
axes[1].fill_between(range(len(hp_prlr)), hp_prlr, 0, 
                      where=hp_prlr <= 0, color='blue', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophilic')
axes[1].plot(range(len(hp_prlr)), hp_prlr, 'k-', linewidth=0.5)
axes[1].axhline(y=1.6, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='TM threshold')
axes[1].axhline(y=0, color='gray', linestyle='-', alpha=0.3)
axes[1].set_title('PRLR (P16471) — Kyte-Doolittle Hydropathy (window=19)', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].set_ylabel('Hydropathy')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Residue position')
axes[1].legend(fontsize=8)

# Mark TM region
axes[1].axvspan(235, 258, color='red', alpha=0.2)
axes[1].annotate('TM\n235-258', xy=(246, 2), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='red')

# Mark domains
for name, start, end in [('FN3-1+EpoR', 27, 128), ('FN3-2', 129, 229)]:
    axes[1].annotate(name, xy=((start+end)/2, -3.5), fontsize=7, ha='center', 
                    color='green', fontweight='bold')
    axes[1].axvspan(start, end, color='green', alpha=0.05)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/hydropathy_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Hydropathy comparison figure saved.")
print(f"\nIL23R TM region (356-376) max hydropathy: {max(hp_il23r[356:377]):.2f}")
print(f"PRLR TM region (235-258) max hydropathy: {max(hp_prlr[235:259]):.2f}")
